recommendations.title: Wish Upon
recommendations.overview: A teenage girl discovers a box with magical powers, but those powers comes with a deadly price.

recommendations.title: The Silence
recommendations.overview: With the world under attack by deadly creatures who hunt by sound, a teen and her family seek refuge outside the city and encounter a mysterious cult.

recommendations.title: Test
recommendations.overview: Kurt Longson tries to avenge his daughters death. To succeed he has to battle with his conscience and morality to realize true love.

recommendations.overview: When a group of friends discover how to conjure spirits using an embalmed hand, they become hooked on the new thrill, until one of them goes too far and unleashes terrifying supernatural forces.

recommendations.overview: After witnessing a bizarre, traumatic incident involving a patient, Dr. Rose Cotter starts experiencing frightening occurrences that she can't explain.
